Windsor *   [Home](https://adrianroach.com/) *   [Properties...](https://adrianroach.com/listings/my-sold-listings#", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Life and Death at San Francisco's Ambassador Hotel", "url": "https://placesjournal.org/article/ambassador-hotel-san-francisco-aids-crisis/", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] URL Source: https://placesjournal.org/article/ambassador-hotel-san-francisco-aids-crisis/ Markdown Content: In the depths of the AIDS epidemic, San Francisco activists transformed a downtown SRO into a center for health care and community life. The residential hotel became a model of queer kinship. Stathis G. Yeros February 2025 [![Image 1: Two people smiling, with their faces very close, as if about to kiss, genders indeterminate.](https://placesjournal.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Yeros-26-Ambassador-e1738622126488-1020x678.jpg)](https://placesjournal.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Yeros-26-Ambassador-e1738622126488.jpg) \u201cDorian in the lobby,\u201d 1993, from the series _AIDS at the Ambassador Hotel_. [Paul Fusco, Magnum Photos] On March 28, 1994, a new documentary aired on KRON TV, San Francisco\u2019s public access television network. Directed by Ken Swartz, the film followed the day-to-day lives of several people with HIV and AIDS who lived in a downtown residential hotel, the Ambassador. [1](https://placesjournal.org/article/ambassador-hotel-san-francisco-aids-crisis/#ref_1 \"Read Footnote 1\") The camera captured everyday interactions among nurses, social workers, staff, and volunteers as they tended to the quotidian needs of resident AIDS patients \u2014 delivering meals, helping with laundry, repairing furniture, sweeping floors. There are angelic acts of selflessness and everyday scuffles. _Life and Death at the Ambassador Hotel_ conveys the controlled chaos within the 150-room residential hotel, showing how one community, in one building, addressed the lack of support services for people who were HIV-positive, and also dealing with racial discrimination, poverty, multiple co-morbidities, and drug and alcohol addictions. [2](https://placesjournal.org/article/ambassador-hotel-san-francisco-aids-crisis/#ref_2 \"Read Footnote 2\") The documentary\u2019s portrait of how the urban poor experienced the height of San Francisco\u2019s AIDS epidemic continues to have implications today. _Life and Death_ profiles a few specific characters. One is Malcolm, a former concert pianist who lost his job and was abandoned by friends and family due to the stigma of his disease. He built a new network of friends in the short amount of time he lived at the Ambassador, and he dies during the making of the film. Another resident, Christopher, who has a long-term drug addiction, was houseless until shortly before the film was made. Having lost any hope of recovery, he refuses to go to the medical clinic. Given a six-month prognosis, he moves into the Ambassador to receive compassionate end-of-life care; it\u2019s the only place that will house him. And finally, there are Hank Wilson and Tom Calvanese, the Ambassador\u2019s charismatic co-managers. [![Image 2](https://placesjournal.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Yeros-28-Ambassador-1020x705.jpg)](https://placesjournal.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Yeros-28-Ambassador.jpg) Ambassador Hotel manager Hank Wilson at front desk, 1992. [Phil Head, San F", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "\u21d2 Andere Mini Wohnwagen K\u00fcche 3 Schlafpl\u00e4tze Camp -", "url": "https://www.truckscout24.com/tsp/ts-189-71-646", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Title: Page not found 404\nURL Source: https://www.truckscout24.com/tsp/ts-189-71-646\nWarning: Target URL returned error 404: Not Found\nMarkdown Content:\nTruckScout24.com is official sponsor of:\n![Image 1: Darts EM](https://cdn.truckscout24.com/img/frontend/template/footer/sponsoring/pdc.svg?v=1763643660)\n![Image 2: american truck promotion](https://cdn.truckscout24.com/img/frontend/template/footer/sponsoring/american_truck.png?v=1763643660)\n![Image 3: EHF Champions League](https://cdn.truckscout24.com/img/frontend/template/footer/sponsoring/ehf_b_ts.svg?v=1763643660)\n![Image 4: Morlock Motors](https://cdn.truckscout24.com/img/frontend/template/footer/sponsoring/morlock_motors.svg?v=1763643660)\n**Successful:** Task carried out\n**Error:** Task could not be carried out\nService & support\nCompany\nLegal matters\nAll information, offers and prices on this website are subject to change and non-binding!\nBy using this website you accept our [**terms and conditions**](https://www.truckscout24.com/terms/) and [**privacy policy**](https://www.truckscout24.com/privacy/). \n Designated trademarks belong to their respective holders. \n TruckScout24 GmbH does not assume liability for the content of linked external websites.\n\u00a9 2000 -
